what: Neural pipeline scored on papygreek-fold-v3 (documentary-Koine dependency fold, reg layer).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; one-shot after the 0.44.0 fold rebuilds (leaf-APOS cc->appos converter correction + per-fold gold repairs); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(); fold papygreek-fold-v3 (sha de687474...); vs v2: exactly 73 leaf-apposition DEPREL cells corrected cc->appos, all other cells byte-identical
vs_v2: UPOS/XPOS/UFeats/lemma/UAS byte-identical to the v2 measurement (the gold change is DEPREL-only); LAS 79.89->79.85 (the model, trained under the old convention, labels bare appositives cc; most of the 73 were already head-wrong, so only a handful flipped)
